title: lupinus arboreus var. eximius
intro: Lupinus arboreus var. eximius, also known as the towering lupine or giant lupine, is a variety of the annual or perennial plant Lupinus arboreus, native to the Pacific coastal regions of North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lupinus arboreus var. eximius are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, among other conditions.
